# Numetal

> Numetal is an agent accelerator studio under Atelier Gökhan. We build and back autonomous agents across four markets — onchain, compute, artistic & cultural, and frontier-lab model toolkits. Chain-agnostic by design: home on Base, settling across Ethereum, Solana, Hyperliquid, and the XRP Ledger. Token: $NUMETAL on Base.

## Links
- [Numetal](https://numetal.xyz): the studio landing
- [Fee engine](https://numetal.xyz/fees): live $NUMETAL buybacks and burns, straight from Base
- [Atelier Gökhan](https://gokhan.vc): the parent studio
- [Terms of Service](https://numetal.xyz/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://numetal.xyz/privacy)
- [Cookie Policy](https://numetal.xyz/cookies)

## Details
- Studio model: ship and back autonomous agents; each effort can carry its own token, with $NUMETAL as the studio token.
- First effort: MOAT, a Bankr-native intelligence agent for the onchain agent economy.
- Markets: onchain (DeFi / x402 services / the Base agent economy), compute (machine-to-machine inference payments), artistic & cultural (generative, speculative, accelerationist), frontier-lab model toolkits (runtimes, skills, harnesses).
- Chains: Base (hub), Ethereum, Solana, Hyperliquid, XRP Ledger.
- Network: Base. Official $NUMETAL contract: 0x57EDb7FC54ADa9Ef4E113DC05A168449e63cFbA3
- $NUMETAL fee policy: every creator-fee claim splits to team, treasury, and burn; buyback & burn feeds value back to the community. Live at /fees.
